001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.player;
002
003import java.util.UUID;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.Screen;
005import net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.Connection;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
008
009/**
010 * A wrapper for a player connected to the server.
011 */
012public interface WrappedPlayer {
013    /**
014     * Get the internal player object that is being wrapped.
015     *
016     * @param <T> Type of player object
017     * @return Internal player object
018     */
019    @NotNull
020    <T> T unwrap();
021
022    /**
023     * Get the player's name.
024     *
025     * @return Player's name
026     */
027    @NotNull
028    String getName();
029
030    /**
031     * Get player's unique identifier.
032     *
033     * @return Unique identifier
034     */
035    @NotNull
036    UUID getUUID();
037
038    /**
039     * Get the player's connection
040     *
041     * @return Player connection
042     */
043    @NotNull
044    Connection getConnection();
045
046    /**
047     * Get the current screen the player is looking at.
048     *
049     * @return The current screen
050     */
051    @Nullable
052    Screen getCurrentScreen();
053
054    /**
055     * Set the screen the player should be looking at.
056     *
057     * @param screen The screen
058     */
059    void setCurrentScreen(@Nullable Screen screen);
060
061    /**
062     * Check if player has Guithium client mod installed.
063     *
064     * @return {@code true} if player has Guithium mod, otherwise {@code false}
065     */
066    boolean hasGuithium();
067}
